name: Nilambur Pattutsavam
description: An ancient temple festival celebrated with traditional music and dance. The Nilambur Vettekkorumakan Paattu is a unique ritualistic dance-music tradition.

name: Annual Teak Festival
description: Celebrating the heritage of teak plantations with exhibitions, timber craft workshops, and forest heritage walks.

name: Chaliyar River Fest & Boat Race
description: A thrilling boat race on the Chaliyar river during the Onam season, attracting teams from all over Malabar.

name: Eco-Craft Workshop
description: Learn the art of pottery and bamboo craft from the famous Kumbham artisans of Aruvacode.
